title: gypsophila filicaulis
intro: Gypsophila filicaulis, also known as frilly gypsophila, is a flowering plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gypsophila filicaulis include its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce anxiety due to its adaptogenic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
